what_it_does: Defines window.CV_REGISTRY, the universal Type Registry for ConceptV Studio. An IIFE that establishes the seven-layer model (token→atom→block→system→surface→doc→template), stores built-in Types in memory and user/vi/template Types in localStorage, and exposes register/registerMany/update/remove/get/all/query plus inheritance resolution (resolve/lineage/children/descendants), socket/slot acceptance logic (accepts/candidatesForSlot/candidatesForSocket/slotEnabled/socketInfo), a normalize() that fills the full Type schema, and a subscribe/notify pub-sub.
observations: LAYERS array and LAYER_INFO map (label/rank/swatch/desc) define the ordered layer model used for sorting (byLayerThenName).

Storage split: BUILTIN Map (memory), USER Map and TEMPLATES Map (persisted to localStorage keys 'cv:registry:user-types' and 'cv:registry:templates'); all storage reads/writes wrapped in empty-catch try blocks.
register routes by provenance/layer (built-in→BUILTIN, template→TEMPLATES, else USER) and persists + notifies unless silent; registerMany suppresses notify and persists once.
update() forks a built-in into user space on edit (provenance:'user', forkedFrom set), bumping version; remove() refuses to delete built-ins.
resolve() flattens a Type with its ancestors via reduceRight (leaf wins), deep-merging defaults/slots, merging variables by key, unioning tags, and attaching a lineage array.

accepts() supports classification-based acceptance (array form or acc.classification/forbid), plus layers/families/tags filters, and evaluates slot.conditions through a shared window.CV_COND.testAll evaluator.

normalize() documents and fills a rich schema: kind, classification (defaults to [kind,family]), slots/sockets as mutual aliases, valueSlots, parts, conditions, axis/axisValue, defaults, variables, runtime, timestamps, version, forkedFrom.
candidatesForSocket is an alias for candidatesForSlot; socketInfo normalizes a socket into kind('slot'|'event')/event/address/onPick/multiple/optional/accepts/conditions.
notify() guards on suppressNotify and swallows subscriber errors in empty catch; loadFromStorage runs at the end.
standouts: This is the single-source-of-truth registry the whole system mirrors — same register/resolve/lineage/query/subscribe API the charter says the AI and other registries deliberately echo.

The vocabulary reconciliation in normalize: slots and sockets are mutual aliases, valueSlots vs type-accepting slots are distinguished, and a token can name an axis+value so 'tokens ARE the value-units of an axis' — one model spanning tokens, axes, and components.
Built-in edit safety: editing a built-in forks it into user space (forkedFrom) rather than mutating the built-in, and built-ins cannot be removed.
conventions: Embodies the project's one-home/extend-by-registration law as the actual mechanism.
Single-inheritance via 'extends' with leaf-wins merge, matching the charter's stated model.
Deviates from loud-fail in places: storage and subscriber errors are swallowed in empty catch blocks; register logs a warn and returns null on missing id rather than throwing.
concerns: Multiple empty catch {} blocks (storage load/save, notify subscribers) silently swallow errors, which conflicts with the project's loud-fail non-negotiable.

register on a non-built-in always writes to USER unless layer==='template'; there is no provenance distinction kept between 'user'/'vi'/'imported' at the storage-bucket level (all share USER), so the schema's provenance values are only metadata.
lineage cycle guard exists (seen set) but resolve assumes a usable chain; a self-extending or broken extends would still resolve to a partial merge.
notes: This is the core single-source Type registry — the seven-layer composition model, inheritance resolution, and socket acceptance that every picker and the Vi composer read from.
questions: Where is window.CV_COND defined and what does testAll evaluate (conditions vocabulary)?
How is the 'vi' provenance distinguished from 'user' downstream if both live in the USER map and the same localStorage key?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — the header declares it the single source of truth with an atomic-composition layered model, one node shape driving all pickers and the composer, and the implementation provides exactly that schema, storage, inheritance, and acceptance machinery.
apparent_themes: Single source of truth / one node shape everywhere
Atomic composition across seven layers with single-inheritance
Tokens and axes unified as value-units
Interface as a projection of the registry
intention_signals: Trying to make one registry the entire composable vocabulary of the studio — every definition from a design token to a re-runnable template lives here, extends others, and embeds others through declarative sockets, so the interface is just a view of it.
novelty: The reconciliation of three vocabularies (registry slots, Glyphic-spec sockets/valueSlots/parts, and tokens-as-axis-value-units) into one normalized schema, plus event-sockets (socketInfo with kind:'event'/onPick) as first-class.
contribution: Contributes the canonical Type schema and the registry API (register/resolve/lineage/query/subscribe), the layer model, localStorage persistence for user/template Types, built-in fork-on-edit safety, and the classification-based socket acceptance engine.
summary_for_embedding: The CV_REGISTRY universal Type registry: a seven-layer (token→template) single-inheritance composition model with localStorage persistence, inheritance resolution, classification-based socket acceptance, and a subscribe/notify API.
intention_for_embedding: To be the one source of truth for every composable definition in ConceptV Studio so all pickers and the Vi composer render from a single layered, extensible, self-describing registry.
